title: What U Want feat. Phloeasy
lyrics: When you feel it comin' in your heart When you feel it comin' in your skull What you need, what you need, what you need What you want, what you want, what you want What you want, what you want, what you need What you want, what you need, what you need Sitting here looking out the edge And I can't understand if it's better to go on from the edge Am I spiritual, am I logical, can't do I understand life, what do I understand And I'll give it some more, some more, some more I'm about to hurt you, accomplish the hurdles you enter in It's like the industry, it takes things on your knees It takes all your complexions, you'll see It's not what you need, it's not what you want It's not what you think, it's what you are Up a little top, that's what you want And you're bearing a bag, you're bearing a backbone What you need, what you need, what you need What you want, what you want, what you need What you need, what you need, what you need What you need, what you need, what you need What you want, what you want, what you need What you want, what you need, what you need Put those ice axe on your back I want you to sit down and listen to what you've done now You're in the back of your mind, spit it on out You've got to come out to run around and have the force through your veins Let them know what you got, know what you need You know what you want, you want to show them all It's all around, it's time, they got to go ahead and do it What you need, what you need, what you need What you want, what you need, what you need Darkness comes, darkness comes Darkness comes, darkness comes Darkness comes, darkness comes Darkness comes, darkness comes Are you one? Are you one? Or have you won? Yo, this is a different song Give it to me, give it to me, what you mean? Woo wooooooooooooo That's what you fuckin' want, motherfucker
